title: NeonGlows
description: Add a awesome glow outline to players!
body:
# ✨ NeonGlows – Let Your Players Shine!  
### The Ultimate Glow Plugin for Minecraft `1.8.x – 1.21.x`  
**By Neon Studios**

---

## 🌈 Features

- 💡 **Glowing Effects with GUI** – Players can toggle glow easily  
- 🎨 **Color Selector** – Choose from a vibrant palette  
- 💬 **Fully Customizable** – Messages, titles, effects, GUI layout  
- 🔧 **PlaceholderAPI Support** – Dynamic GUI and glow status display  
- 🎵 **Sound & Visual Effects** – Toggleable animations, particles, and sounds  
- ⚙️ **Admin Tools** – Reload configs, manage glow settings  
- 🔁 **Reload Support** – No server restart required  
- ⚡ **Optimized & Lightweight** – Minimal performance impact

---

## 🧪 Compatibility

| Feature              | Supported                    |
|----------------------|------------------------------|
| **Minecraft Versions** | `1.8.x` to `1.21.x`          |
| **Java**               | 8+                           |
| **Server Types**       | Paper, Spigot, Purpur        |
| **Hooks**              | LuckPerms, EssentialsX, PlaceholderAPI |

---

## 📋 Commands & Permissions

| Command              | Description                  | Permission                  |
|----------------------|------------------------------|-----------------------------|
| `/glow`              | Open glow selector GUI       | `neonglows.use`             |
| `/glow set <color>`  | Set glow to specific color   | `neonglows.color.<color>`   |
| `/glow off`          | Disable your glow            | `neonglows.use`             |
| `/neonglows reload`  | Reload config & files        | `neonglows.admin`           |

---

## 🛠️ Config Files

- `config.yml` – Sound toggle, particle effects, teleport delay  
- `messages.yml` – Titles, chat messages, actionbars  
- `gui.yml` – Custom layout, icons, and glow labels  

---

## 💼 Use Cases

- 🛡️ **PvP Arenas** – Highlight active fighters  
- 👑 **Donator Perks** – Add stylish glow cosmetics  
- 🧙 **Roleplay Servers** – Assign glow by class or faction  
- 🎉 **Event Hosts** – Visually mark leaders and winners  
- 🏕️ **Lobby & SMP** – Let VIPs stand out from the crowd

---

## 🚀 Installation

1. Drop `NeonGlows.jar` into your `/plugins` folder  
2. Restart or reload the server  
3. Edit config files to your liking  
4. Run `/glow` in-game and let players shine bright ✨

---

## 🔒 Support

Need help or want to request a feature?
[**📨 Join our support server**](https://discord.gg/zENKtkYZuX)
